message: Node started: Evaluate the role of the state preparation history in the context of the Thermal Time Hypothesis. Determine whether the modular flow's dependence on the density matrix (which encodes the specific preparation of the excited state) implies that the resulting 'time' is state-dependent rather than a universal parameter. Conclude whether this state-dependence constitutes a failure of the TTH for excited states and provide the binary conclusion (Yes/No) regarding whether modular flow generates correct time evolution for these states.
